title: Storybook coverage for kanbus_clock card variants
description: Add Storybook stories for Kanbus notification card layouts used by demos/kanbus_clock.py, including created/transition/comment/unknown, parent/no-parent, long-header, wrapping, and issue-type color variants.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Started implementation. Next: inspect current Storybook structure/components, then add a dedicated Kanbus card stories file grouped by event type + edge cases used in kanbus_clock.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Implemented Storybook Kanbus card coverage: added reusable KanbusCard component + Pixoo/KanbusClockCards stories for created/transition/comment/unknown, parent/no-parent, long-header overflow, and issue-type color variants. Storybook build passes.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Implementing reusable two-row issue description component for Kanbus cards and wiring it for both parent and current issue blocks in Storybook demo.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Implemented reusable IssueDescriptionBlock component and migrated KanbusCard parent/current issue sections to use it. Storybook build passes; demo restarted for device visual verification.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Tightening Kanbus header spacing: normalizing token whitespace and setting in-token word-space width to 3px to match requested visual spacing.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Adjusting this-issue block vertical text offset to match parent block exactly in shared IssueDescriptionBlock usage.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Adjusting KanbusHeader spacing again with optical compensation for Bytesized glyph bearings; reducing injected whitespace/gap widths to target visual 3px on-device.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Reverting accidental header spacing regression; applying 3px word-spacing fix only to reusable IssueDescriptionBlock for parent/current issue text.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Applying visual tweak: comment body text now uses sand color band at current intensity level in Kanbus cards.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Adjusting IssueDescriptionBlock word spacing only: replace font default spaces with explicit fixed 3px inter-word gaps to eliminate overly wide spacing in description rows.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Increasing Kanbus comment card text capacity by two rows in React layout logic for live readability testing.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Tweaking with-parent comment layouts: shifting comment body rows down by 1px for better vertical balance.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Increasing non-comment (created/transition) card body capacity by +3 rows and expanding Storybook content to fill those rows for visual validation.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Adjusting no-parent comment layout: +1 comment row and move whole comment block down by 2px for improved balance.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Implementing text wrapping for description/comment sections: long text will wrap across available row slots instead of clipping per row.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Wrap tuning: removing conservative right-side margin so description/comment text can use full row width.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Wrap width tuning: reducing max chars slightly to prevent right-edge clipping while keeping near-full line utilization.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Applying palette notch tweak: dim header/description text by one step and brighten comment text by one step for card readability.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Unifying created/transition layouts with comment design pattern: no-parent variants will also use shared 2-row issue block + wrapped body rows.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: debug event for real-layout verification

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: debug after timeout increase

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: event after workspace/project fallback patch
